name: CAST Automation Storage

allowed: Files and folders reachable from this shared Dropbox folder only
denied: Personal/company folders outside the shared CAST Automation Storage link

guardrails: Read/list/index only inside the shared folder link or an explicitly approved local sync path for this same folder.
No deletes, moves, renames, uploads, shared-link creation/revocation, or permission changes without explicit approval.
Do not browse other Dropbox folders or run account-wide Dropbox search.
Treat all contents as private CAST Build project material.

additionalFolders.name: Claude Projects
additionalFolders.scope: Approved only if contained inside the existing CAST Automation Storage shared Dropbox folder boundary.
notes: Lawrence said all Claude projects were added to the Dropbox folder. Latest downloadable shared-folder ZIP still reported the same size and current extracted manifest contains only Alüm Current Drawings/RFIs/Submittals, so refresh/re-download later before indexing Claude project contents.
